mapper.select: SELECT E1.EMPNO, E1.ENAME, E1.JOB, E2.ENAME AS MGRNAME, GRADE, D.DNAME FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO INNER JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offSet}
SELECT E.*, D.DNAME FROM EMP E JOIN DEPT D ON E.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO WHERE E.EMPNO = #{empNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMP E1 LEFT JOIN EMP E2 ON E1.MGR = E2.EMPNO INNER JOIN DEPT D ON E1.DEPTNO = D.DEPTNO LEFT JOIN SALGRADE S ON E1.SAL BETWEEN S.LOSAL AND S.HISAL
